title: Matthew Adelstein
description: Visiting Scholar — Alongside his work for Forethought, Matthew Adelstein is the author of the blog [Bentham's Bulldog](https://benthams.substack.com/). He is a philosophy graduate from the University of Michigan.
body:
# Matthew Adelstein

**Role:** Visiting Scholar

Alongside his work for Forethought, Matthew Adelstein is the author of the blog [Bentham's Bulldog](https://benthams.substack.com/). He is a philosophy graduate from the University of Michigan.
